import { useState } from "react"; import "./AuditLog.css"; const AUDIT_ENTRIES = [ { id: "AUD-9041", docId: "CHQ-2041", action: "FRAUD_FLAG", actor: "XGBoost v1.4", result: "Score 91 — FLAGGED", time: "07 Apr 2026, 02:41:18", type: "ml", bank: "YES Bank", amount: "₹12,00,000" }, { id: "AUD-9040", docId: "CHQ-2041", action: "SIG_REJECT", actor: "Siamese v2.1", result: "Conf 42% — REJECTED", time: "07 Apr 2026, 02:41:14", type: "ml", bank: "YES Bank", amount: "₹12,00,000" }, { id: "AUD-9039", docId: "CHQ-2041", action: "OCR_EXTRACT", actor: "AWS Textract", result: "6 fields extracted", time: "07 Apr 2026, 02:41:09", type: "system", bank: "YES Bank", amount: "₹12,00,000" }, { id: "AUD-9038", docId: "INV-0931", action: "HUMAN_OVERRIDE", actor: "Rahul Bajaj", result: "Sent for manual review",time: "07 Apr 2026, 10:20:05", type: "human", bank: "ICICI Bank", amount: "₹18,500" }, { id: "AUD-9037", docId: "INV-0931", action: "FRAUD_FLAG", actor: "XGBoost v1.4", result: "Score 71 — REVIEW", time: "07 Apr 2026, 10:15:42", type: "ml", bank: "ICICI Bank", amount: "₹18,500" }, { id: "AUD-9036", docId: "CHQ-2039", action: "DECISION_PENDING", actor: "System", result: "Awaiting analyst", time: "07 Apr 2026, 09:52:33", type: "system", bank: "SBI", amount: "₹85,000" }, { id: "AUD-9035", docId: "LNA-0214", action: "APPROVED", actor: "LayoutLM v3", result: "All checks passed", time: "07 Apr 2026, 11:20:11", type: "ml", bank: "Kotak Bank", amount: "₹5,00,000" }, { id: "AUD-9034", docId: "CHQ-2037", action: "APPROVED", actor: "Pipeline v2", result: "SIG 94% · FRAUD 6%", time: "07 Apr 2026, 11:10:02", type: "ml", bank: "HDFC Bank", amount: "₹2,40,000" }, { id: "AUD-9033", docId: "CHQ-2038", action: "REJECTED", actor: "Rahul Bajaj", result: "Signature forged", time: "07 Apr 2026, 08:30:15", type: "human", bank: "Axis Bank", amount: "₹3,40,000" }, { id: "AUD-9032", docId: "KYC-1102", action: "APPROVED", actor: "BERT NER v3", result: "Identity verified", time: "07 Apr 2026, 09:05:44", type: "ml", bank: "Axis Bank", amount: "—" }, ]; const ACTION_COLORS = { FRAUD_FLAG: { color: "var(--accent-red)", bg: "badge-red" }, SIG_REJECT: { color: "var(--accent-red)", bg: "badge-red" }, OCR_EXTRACT: { color: "var(--accent-cyan)", bg: "badge-cyan" }, HUMAN_OVERRIDE: { color: "var(--accent-purple)", bg: "badge-purple" }, APPROVED: { color: "var(--accent-green)", bg: "badge-green" }, REJECTED: { color: "var(--accent-red)", bg: "badge-red" }, DECISION_PENDING: { color: "var(--accent-amber)", bg: "badge-amber" }, }; const TYPE_ICONS = { ml: "◉", system: "◈", human: "◎" }; export default function AuditLog() { const [search, setSearch] = useState(""); const [filterType, setFilterType] = useState("all"); const [expanded, setExpanded] = useState(null); const filtered = AUDIT_ENTRIES.filter(e => { const matchSearch = !search || e.docId.toLowerCase().includes(search.toLowerCase()) || e.actor.toLowerCase().includes(search.toLowerCase()) || e.bank.toLowerCase().includes(search.toLowerCase()); const matchType = filterType === "all" || e.type === filterType; return matchSearch && matchType; }); return (
{/* Header Controls */}
setSearch(e.target.value)} />
{["all", "ml", "system", "human"].map(t => ( ))}
{AUDIT_ENTRIES.length} Total Events
{AUDIT_ENTRIES.filter(e => e.action === "APPROVED").length} Approved
{AUDIT_ENTRIES.filter(e => e.action === "REJECTED" || e.action === "FRAUD_FLAG").length} Flagged
{/* Immutable badge */}
⊛ Immutable Audit Trail {" — "} All entries are cryptographically hashed and write-once. Compliant with RBI IT Framework 2021 · Circular No. RBI/2021-22/82. HASH: SHA-256
{/* Table */}
{filtered.map(entry => { const ac = ACTION_COLORS[entry.action] || { bg: "badge-cyan" }; const isExp = expanded === entry.id; return ( <> {isExp && ( )} ); })}
Audit ID Doc ID Action Actor Bank Amount Result Timestamp
{entry.id} {entry.docId} {entry.action.replace("_", " ")}
{TYPE_ICONS[entry.type]} {entry.actor}
{entry.bank} {entry.amount} {entry.result} {entry.time}
Event Details
Event Type{entry.type.toUpperCase()}
Document ID{entry.docId}
Action{entry.action}
Actor{entry.actor}
Integrity Hash
{`SHA256::${entry.id}::${entry.docId}::${entry.time}`.split("").map((c, i) => ( {c} ))}
{`a3f9b2c1d8e4f7a0b3c6d9e2f5a8b1c4d7e0f3a6b9c2d5e8f1a4b7c0d3e6f9`}
Compliance Notes
RBI RefIT/2021-22/82
Retention7 years
EncryptedAES-256
{filtered.length === 0 && (
≋ No audit entries match your search
)}
); }
